review_body_text: Once youve entered this Plaza Pantai building on level 15, say goodbye to your good life. As a banker and a telesales, over here you dont have any further knowledge about banking and finance. You can try to ask your manager and they will answer "that is not necessary for you to know, you just need to deliver the number. Thats all".. Is it fair? Well, that is what we've been facing. Racist? Hahaha goodluck on being good. Bias? Goodluck again. Suggested? Nahhh go for other bank. Sallary? Okay lah if you can do well.
cons_text: Even if you take Annual Leave, that one will be questionable.

review_body_text: It was fun to be part of cimb bank but i dont like the system management on them. Should minimise the system and organise it well. Do a lot of activity
cons_text: Short breaks and little time to go for prayer

review_body_text: They provide pantry at each level. We can access the gym anytime so we can exercise before or after working hours. Friendly working environment. I am really enjoy working at the company. Just that I was only an employee under recruit firm makes me sad.

Long working hours to meet deadlines, days in lieu of extra hours worked are not given. There is no cohesion between departments as the management team's focus is to meet their individual targets and not the company as a whole. Political infighting.

review_title: comfortable workplace and helping each other
review_body_text: Work at CIMB, give me experince about handel cash etc, and also about how to attend customer . Also update and learn about system that always give us chance to learn new thing.
pros_text: Ot and claim travel include breakfast, lunch, dinner, toll

review_body_text: I have learned a lot of new knowledge while working here, especially on how banking organization works. I learn about how to deal with customers properly, what we should reacts when facing cranky customers, and this position teach me about how to be a patience person. In term of working facilities, it is very good. All prominent things are provided such as there are complete equipment in pantry rest room also provided. The working culture is superb because everyone focus on their task because they have their target that the should be done daily and we always stay back after normal working hour everyday. Moreover, the hardest part of this job is we need to push customers to pay their debt and the do not have the money and we have to come up with the solutions for them. the most enjoyable part is by the time we hit the target and we can enjoy the incentives.

review_title: Productive and enjoyable with gym room, zumba class
review_body_text: Make a call everyday to remind customer. Learn about customer behavior. Very good management with nice workplace culture. Hard to achieve KPI every month.

review_title: Flexible Work with Mobile sales at Shopping Complex
review_body_text: Following normal 5 days working with follow shopping complex working hours 11am to 8pm. advantages a lot about loan processing, procedures, contacts of bankers and certificates, benefits training, good relationship with the customer. Strict management always reminding and follow up our each every activity. The friendly boss always helps to the case. The hardest part is we can't promise to customers to loan approval.

Its an 8.30 am to 5.45 am working hours. In CIMB iI have learned all the working should be detailed as possible. Their management was the best and working culture was ok. The hardest part of this job was to keep the data accurate before submitting it to the respective person in charge. The most enjoyable part of this job is I got the chance to work with the director directly.

review_title: Working as an Assistant Manager with CIMB Bank, Malaysia from Dec. 2015 to Till Date
review_body_text: Working as an Assistant Manager with CIMB Bank, Malaysia from Dec. 2015 to Till Date We are supporting various modules for various locations like Deposits, Loan/ ATM /CIF. Below is the list of Deliveries(module/Country)

review_title: It is an okay place to work at
review_body_text: The fun part comes from the colleagues you work with. Not a very good compensation from the organization. Get to meet lots of different people from various department.

review_title: Very discipline but fun working environment
review_body_text: Working with CIMB Bank makes me more aware about the financial industries perhaps due to quality and consistent training provided by the bank. The discipline but fun working culture adapted by the bank makes staff hard to think about leaving the Company. Conclusion CIMB Bank as a second largest bank in Malaysia has projected a very good image of Financial Institution of Malaysia
cons_text: No longer focus for internal sports nand recreation

review_body_text: Work place environment should be conducive with sufficient support extended to employees. Never say no to obstacles but embrace them as everything has a solution.
pros_text: New ideas and knowledge in a different industry

review_title: very helping, motivated and positive staff
review_body_text: I was located at the front desk to welcoming and attend walk in customer, i need to filter customer on the beginning to keep queue time in the good condition, the roles for staff at the front desk is important to short the process before they go to counter. for example they need to fill any form before the queue number being called, so it will make it the process become fast. Sometimes we assist customer on their problems, such as how to register on the cimb clicks, how to transfer money and so on. Usually senior citizen does not familiar with the technology, so they need someone that can be trusted to assist them.
pros_text: you can back on time as there no overtime for SL1M staff
cons_text: there's no benefit for a SL1M staff

review_body_text: Very good place for the add knowledge and experience with cimb. The benefits they offer to the staff is good. Just love what you do can make easier for your career.

review_title: Productive and learn more about fiance with my senior
review_body_text: I am also responsible for sales/reporting,prospecting and training new employees during my employment , I have completed these examination and holding the certifications for -Takaful basic examination (TBE) by IBFIM -Pre contract Examination for insurance agent (PCIEA) by MII
cons_text: no payment went i work overtime

review_body_text: Good Place as a Staff. Good of Working Environment, Well organized team, a lot of administration duties learn and opportunity work in customer service industries and banking.
Nice company to work with, good potential as the CIMB Direction is to conger ASEAN. Good exposure for fresh graduates as the learning many banking SOPs.
A great workplace and good for career growth progression. Have to learn to be a multitask person and to prioritize workload. In addition, have a great staffs.
Nice place to work. Learning is there but some times feel monotony in work. Management is good and Work place culture is also good, everyone will help if you are stuck at some point.
